description: Three composable novel TTT-LoRA improvements on top of dexhunter's phased TTT pipeline: (1) standard alpha/rank LoRA scaling so rank can be raised without instability, (2) warm-start of LoRA A across batches to let feature directions accumulate, (3) raised weight decay (0.5 -> 1.0) that regularizes the warmed A and prevents cross-batch overfit. 3-seed mean 1.07266 BPB.
methods: Novel (1): alpha/rank scaling on BatchedLinearLoRA output. Standard LoRA formulation, absent in prior phased-TTT submissions. Decouples rank from effective LR so higher-rank LoRA stays stable.

Novel (2): warm-start of LoRA A across batches (only B is reset to zero between batch boundaries). Lets the A matrix accumulate feature directions across the phased-TTT schedule instead of being re-randomized each batch.

Novel (3): raised TTT weight decay from 0.5 to 1.0, chosen specifically to counteract the across-batch overfit that full warm-start A alone caused on seed 314. Without this change warm-start is net zero; with it, all three seeds improve or tie.
LoRA rank 128 (vs prior 96), alpha=96, now safely higher capacity thanks to change (1)
Inherits dexhunter's phased TTT + multi-phase global SGD + trimmed GPTQ + MATRIX_LR=0.026; samacqua's VarLen + Fused Triton MLP; bigbag's triple depth recurrence + parallel residuals
